description_long: This is a rectangular snack package with a predominantly red exterior, featuring a large white oval on the front with the 'Kit Kat' logo in bold red letters and an image of two chocolate wafer bars. The sides of the package display the phrase 'Come mais um!' in large white text. The back of the package includes a hashtag '#BESKAME4EVER' in white, as well as a small nutrition facts panel and additional product information in fine print. The packaging appears to be made of a glossy, flexible material, likely a plastic or foil laminate, commonly used for snack bars. The overall design is vibrant and eye-catching, with clear branding and product imagery. The object is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld use and easy transport.
description: A red, rectangular Kit Kat snack package with bold branding, chocolate bar imagery, and nutritional labeling on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large 'Kit Kat' logo, white oval, and chocolate wafer bar images.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the phrase 'Come mais um!' in large white text on a red background.
description_view_2: Back view featuring the hashtag '#BESKAME4EVER', a nutrition facts panel, and additional product information.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing 'Come mais um!' in white text on red.
attribute_brand_logo: A large 'Kit Kat' logo in red and white, located on the front face within a white oval, accompanied by images of chocolate wafer bars.
attribute_flavor_indication: Chocolate flavor indicated by images of chocolate wafer bars on the front.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing nutritional information in a small box.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Hashtag '#BESKAME4EVER' in white on the back, serving as a promotional or social media graphic.
